channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Wisconsin man accused of setting fire to congressman's office over TikTok ban charged with arson
item.description: Prosecutors have charged a Wisconsin man who allegedly told police he tried to burn down a congressman's office because he was upset over the federal TikTok ban with felony arson.
item.dc:creator: Todd Richmond, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: MrBeast not quite in the bidding race for TikTok just yet, rep says
item.description: Jimmy Donaldson — better known online as MrBeast — isn't in the TikTok bidding race just yet, according to a representative for the YouTube star. Donaldson stirred interest in a Jan. 13 post on X saying he’d “buy TikTok so it doesn’t get banned.
item.dc:creator: JAMES POLLARD, HALELUYA HADERO and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 5 best home inventory apps to protect your property in case of emergency
item.description: Home inventory and restoration apps help itemize and track every item in your home in the event you have to make an insurance claim after a natural disaster.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump rescinds Biden's executive order on AI safety in attempt to diverge from his predecessor
item.description: Hours after returning to the White House, President Donald Trump made a symbolic mark on the future of artificial intelligence by repealing former President Joe Biden’s guardrails for the fast-developing technology.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Donald Trump’s executive order puts Santa Cruz EV charging grant in jeopardy
item.description: Reps. Zoe Lofgren and Jimmy Panetta announced they had helped secure more than $14.3 million from the U.S. Department of Transportation that was expected to go toward the installation of electric vehicle charging ports at 44 sites across Santa Cruz and Monterey counties.
item.dc:creator: Pk Hattis, The Mercury News

item.title: OpenAI signs deal with Oracle, Softbank for $500bn expansion across US
item.description: Project Stargate will focus on upgrading AI infrastructure across the US, creating new jobs as it goes.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: These tech leaders have jobs in the Trump administration
item.description: President Trump has been tapping a number of tech executives for a range of roles in his second administration over the past few months. Now, the first week of Trump’s second term, his cabinet is powering through confirmation hearings and unofficial advisors are assuming their posts.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Trump pardons founder of Silk Road website
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump announced Tuesday that he had pardoned Ross Ulbricht, the founder of Silk Road, an underground website for selling drugs.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump announces up to $500 billion investment to build AI infrastructure
item.description: President Trump on Tuesday announced the creation of a new project to invest up to $500 billion in building the infrastructure needed for artificial intelligence (AI) development over his second term.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: TikTok ban on hold for 75 days, but Trump may make a deal with China
item.description: President Donald Trump signed an executive order on Monday seeking to delay by 75 days the enforcement of a ban of popular short-video app TikTok that was slated to be shuttered on January 19. While signing the order, Trump suggested the United States government should be a half owner of TikTok’s U.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: US GPU export limits could bring cold war to AI, data center markets
item.description: The US Biden administration, during its final week in office, issued a rule limiting sales of powerful AI chips to more than 100 countries, to keep the technology out of the hands of Chinese companies and the military there.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Musk’s straight-arm gesture embraced by right-wing extremists regardless of what he meant
item.description: The confusion hasn’t stopped critics and fans alike of the world’s richest man from reading into the gesture what they wanted.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Apple will add AI Mail tools to Macs and iPads this spring
item.description: Apple is about to improve its email application, Mail, on iPads and Macs. Both platforms will soon gain the same Apple Intelligence email summary and prioritization systems already available on iPhones — though not every iPhone user seems to have embraced the new systems.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump, a populist president, is flanked by tech billionaires at his inauguration
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Some of the most exclusive seats at President Donald Trump’s inauguration on Monday were reserved for powerful tech CEOs who also happen to be among the world’s richest men.
item.dc:creator: ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How TikTok grew from a fun app for teens into a potential national security threat
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — If it feels like TikTok has been around forever, that's probably because it has, at least if you're measuring via internet time.
item.dc:creator: DAVID HAMILTON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump says he will ‘most likely’ give TikTok 90-day extension
item.description: “The 90-day extension is something that will be most likely done, because it's appropriate," Trump said in a call with NBC News.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Fake job interview emails installing hidden cryptocurrency mining malware
item.description: Scammers have a new trick where they pretend to be job recruiters to plant malicious apps on your devices. It all starts with a deceptive email.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: For TikTok users, mourning, frustration and clinging to hope as TikTok ban looms
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The U.S. is inching closer and closer to a potential TikTok ban — with the nation's highest court upholding a law that's set to halt new downloads of the app starting Sunday.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS and MAE ANDERSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: TikTok refugees are pouring to Xiaohongshu. Here's what you need to know about the RedNote app
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As the fate of TikTok hangs in the balance, U.S. TikTok users are flocking to the Chinese social media app Xiaohongshu, also called RedNote – making it the top downloaded app in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: FU TING and DAVID COHEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Carnahan accomplished much of what she came to GSA to do
item.description: Robin Carnahan, the out-going GSA administrator, said the federal footprint shrunk by 11 million square feet and saved $2 billion in 2024 alone. The post Carnahan accomplished much of what she came to GSA to do first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Biden's new executive order aims to shore up US cyber defenses
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden issued an executive order Thursday aimed at strengthening the nation's cybersecurity and making it easier to go after foreign adversaries or hacking groups that try to compromise U.S. internet and telecommunication systems.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: ChatGPT gets support for reminders and scheduled searches
item.description:
OpenAI has started rolling out a number of new features to ChatGPT, according to Techcrunch.
The big news is support for reminders; the feature allows users, for example, to ask ChatGPT to remind them when it’s time to renew an ID or passport.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Drone collides with paraglider, forcing emergency landing
item.description: The incident happened the same day that a firefighting aircraft had to be grounded while battling the Palisades Fire.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, NewsNation

item.title: Snowflake open sources SwiftKV to reduce inference workload costs
item.description: Cloud-based data warehouse company Snowflake has open-sourced a new proprietary approach — SwiftKV — designed to reduce the cost of inference workloads for enterprises running generative AI-based applications. SwiftKV was launched in December.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC posts 57% surge in profit thanks to the AI boom
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Taiwan computer chip maker TSMC reported Thursday that its profit in the last quarter rose 57%, buoyed by the artificial intelligence boom. The world’s biggest semiconductor manufacturer reported a net profit of 374.7 billion new Taiwan dollars ($11.4 billion), higher than expected.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fox will stream next month's Super Bowl for free on Tubi
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fox will stream the Super Bowl on Tubi for the first time, giving streamers and cord cutters a chance to watch the big game on Feb. 9 for free. Tubi was acquired by Fox Corporation in 2020. It is a free, ad-supported streaming service.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: How to expedite your CMMC process
item.description: The Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification rule is now final, yet we still see organizations seeking certification waiting to implement the requirements. The post How to expedite your CMMC process first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network
